---
title: "早稲田大学"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
source("../common_site.R", local = TRUE)

TEAM <- "早稲田"

team_info <- team_meta |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

team_current <- current_team_table |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

team_games <- team_game_log |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  arrange(gamedate) |>
  mutate(game_number = row_number())

team_scope <- team_games |>
  filter(game_number >= 31)

scope_average <- if (nrow(team_scope) > 0) round(mean(team_scope$rating_after), 1) else NA_real_

peak_game <- team_scope |>
  arrange(desc(rating_after), desc(gamedate)) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

low_game <- team_scope |>
  arrange(rating_after, desc(gamedate)) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

avg_game <- team_scope |>
  mutate(avg_gap = abs(rating_after - scope_average)) |>
  arrange(avg_gap, desc(gamedate)) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

season_spans <- team_games |>
  distinct(gamedate, season) |>
  arrange(gamedate) |>
  mutate(
    season_group = cumsum(
      season != lag(season, default = first(season)) |
        year(gamedate) != lag(year(gamedate), default = first(year(gamedate)))
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(season_group) |>
  summarise(
    season = first(season),
    span_start = min(gamedate),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    next_start = lead(span_start),
    span_end = if_else(
      is.na(next_start),
      max(team_games$gamedate),
      next_start - days(1)
    ),
    fill = if_else(season == "春", "rgba(113, 164, 88, 0.16)", "rgba(194, 104, 104, 0.16)")
  )

plot_shapes <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(season_spans)), function(i) {
  row <- season_spans[i, ]
  list(
    type = "rect",
    xref = "x",
    yref = "paper",
    x0 = row$span_start[[1]],
    x1 = row$span_end[[1]],
    y0 = 0,
    y1 = 1,
    fillcolor = row$fill[[1]],
    opacity = 1,
    line = list(width = 0),
    layer = "below"
  )
})

team_plot_df <- team_games |>
  transmute(
    gamedate,
    rating_after = round(rating_after, 1),
    rank_after,
    hover_text = paste0(
      fmt_date(gamedate),
      "<br>",
      hover_result,
      "<br>Rating ", sprintf("%.1f", rating_after),
      "<br>Rank ", rank_after
    )
  )

team_plot <- plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = team_plot_df,
    x = ~gamedate,
    y = ~rating_after,
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "lines+markers",
    name = "RATING",
    line = list(color = team_info$c1[[1]], width = 3),
    marker = list(size = 6, color = team_info$c1[[1]]),
    text = ~hover_text,
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = team_plot_df,
    x = ~gamedate,
    y = ~rank_after,
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "lines+markers",
    name = "RANK",
    yaxis = "y2",
    line = list(color = "rgba(23, 50, 74, 0.72)", width = 2, dash = "dot"),
    marker = list(size = 5, color = "rgba(23, 50, 74, 0.72)"),
    text = ~hover_text,
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |>
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.96)",
    margin = list(l = 48, r = 56, t = 20, b = 44),
    xaxis = list(title = "", tickformat = "%Y/%m"),
    yaxis = list(title = "RATING"),
    yaxis2 = list(
      title = "RANK",
      overlaying = "y",
      side = "right",
      autorange = "reversed",
      dtick = 1
    ),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", x = 0, y = 1.1),
    shapes = plot_shapes
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE, responsive = TRUE)

record_card <- function(kicker, value, row) {
  note <- if (nrow(row) == 0) {
    "NO DATA"
  } else {
    paste0(
      fmt_date(row$gamedate[[1]]),
      "  ",
      row$team_name[[1]],
      " ",
      row$score_for[[1]],
      "-",
      row$score_against[[1]],
      " ",
      row$opponent_name[[1]]
    )
  }

  div(
    class = "metric-card",
    div(class = "metric-label", kicker),
    div(class = "metric-value", value),
    div(class = "metric-note", note)
  )
}

team_game_rows <- team_games |>
  transmute(
    date = format(gamedate, "%Y-%m-%d"),
    date_label = fmt_date(gamedate),
    gametype,
    team_name,
    team_url = team_url(team),
    team_color,
    score_for,
    score_against,
    opponent_name,
    opponent_url = team_url(opponent),
    opponent_color,
    rating_move_label = sprintf("%+.1f", rating_delta)
  )

team_game_rows_json <- toJSON(team_game_rows, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)
team_default_date <- if (nrow(team_games) > 0) format(max(team_games$gamedate), "%Y-%m-%d") else format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
```

::: {.minimal-hero}
<div class="minimal-kicker">UNIVERSITY</div>
<h1 class="minimal-title">`r team_info$TeamName[[1]]`</h1>
<div class="hero-meta-strip">
  <span>RANK `r team_current$rank[[1]]`</span>
  <span>RATE `r sprintf('%.1f', team_current$display_rating[[1]])`</span>
  <span>LEAGUE `r team_info$LeagueName[[1]]`</span>
  <span>LAST `r fmt_date(team_current$last_gamedate[[1]])`</span>
</div>
:::

<div class="section-actions">
  <a href="../explore.html#university-browser" class="directory-link">大学一覧へ戻る</a>
</div>

## RECORDS

```{r record-cards}
div(
  class = "metric-grid",
  div(
    class = "metric-card",
    div(class = "metric-label", "CURRENT"),
    div(class = "metric-value", sprintf("%.1f", team_current$display_rating[[1]])),
    div(class = "metric-note", paste0("Rank ", team_current$rank[[1]], " / ", fmt_date(team_current$last_gamedate[[1]])))
  ),
  record_card("HIGHEST SINCE GAME 31", if (nrow(peak_game) > 0) sprintf("%.1f", peak_game$rating_after[[1]]) else "N/A", peak_game),
  record_card("LOWEST SINCE GAME 31", if (nrow(low_game) > 0) sprintf("%.1f", low_game$rating_after[[1]]) else "N/A", low_game),
  record_card("AVERAGE SINCE GAME 31", if (!is.na(scope_average)) sprintf("%.1f", scope_average) else "N/A", avg_game)
)
```

## RATING / RANK TREND

```{r team-plot}
team_plot
```

## DAILY GAMES

```{r team-games-panel}
div(
  class = "game-panel",
  div(
    class = "game-panel-head",
    tags$label(`for` = "team-games-date", class = "control-label", "DATE"),
    tags$input(
      id = "team-games-date",
      class = "control-input",
      type = "date",
      value = team_default_date
    ),
    tags$div(id = "team-games-count", class = "table-count")
  ),
  tags$div(id = "team-games-table")
)
```

```{r team-games-script}
team_games_script <- paste0(
  "(function(){",
  "const rows = ", team_game_rows_json, ";",
  "const input = document.getElementById('team-games-date');",
  "const count = document.getElementById('team-games-count');",
  "const target = document.getElementById('team-games-table');",
  "if (!input || !count || !target) { return; }",
  "function esc(v){ return String(v ?? '').replace(/[&<>\\\"']/g, function(ch){ return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','\\\"':'&quot;',\"'\":'&#39;'})[ch]; }); }",
  "function render(){",
  "  const filtered = rows.filter(function(row){ return row.date === input.value; });",
  "  count.textContent = filtered.length + ' games';",
  "  if (!filtered.length) {",
  "    target.innerHTML = '<div class=\"empty-state\">NO GAMES</div>';",
  "    return;",
  "  }",
  "  const body = filtered.map(function(row){",
  "    return '<tr>' +",
  "      '<td>' + esc(row.gametype) + '</td>' +",
  "      '<td class=\"matchup-col\"><a href=\"' + esc(row.team_url) + '\" style=\"color:' + esc(row.team_color) + '\" class=\"team-link-inline\">' + esc(row.team_name) + '</a><span class=\"score-inline\">' + esc(row.score_for) + ' - ' + esc(row.score_against) + '</span><a href=\"' + esc(row.opponent_url) + '\" style=\"color:' + esc(row.opponent_color) + '\" class=\"team-link-inline\">' + esc(row.opponent_name) + '</a></td>' +",
  "      '<td>' + esc(row.rating_move_label) + '</td>' +",
  "    '</tr>';",
  "  }).join('');",
  "  target.innerHTML = '<div class=\"table-shell compact-table-shell\"><table class=\"compact-data-table\"><thead><tr><th>TYPE</th><th>MATCHUP</th><th>RATING MOVE</th></tr></thead><tbody>' + body + '</tbody></table></div>';",
  "}",
  "input.addEventListener('change', render);",
  "render();",
  "})();"
)

tags$script(HTML(team_games_script))
```
